wizard.checking.title: Checking setup availability...
wizard.unavailable.title: Setup Wizard Unavailable
wizard.checking.description: Verifying whether this instance is still in first-run setup mode.
welcome.title: Welcome to Strada.Brain
welcome.description: AI-powered Unity development assistant. Let's configure your environment.
providers.title: AI Providers
providers.subtitle: Choose a preset or manually select providers for your AI pipeline.
providers.accessSummary: Configure the default worker model and access mode Strada should use after setup.
providers.openai.subscriptionInfo: Strada will use the local Codex/ChatGPT subscription session available on this machine for OpenAI conversation turns.
providers.openai.subscriptionWarning: This does not grant OpenAI API or embedding quota. If you later choose OpenAI for embeddings, you still need an OpenAI API key.
providers.claude.subscriptionInfo: Strada will send Claude requests with the subscription token you provide here.
providers.claude.subscriptionWarning: Anthropic documents claude.ai subscription auth as restricted outside Claude Code and Claude.ai. Strada exposes this mode only if you choose to use it, at your own risk.
providers.presets.free.name: Free
providers.presets.budget.name: Budget
providers.presets.balanced.name: Balanced
providers.presets.performance.name: Performance
providers.presets.premium.name: Premium
providers.authModes.claude.apiKey.label: API Key
providers.authModes.claude.apiKey.descri: Use Anthropic API billing with a standard API key.
Use a Claude subscription token. Run `claude auth login --claudeai`, then `claude setup-token`, and paste the generated token here. Use at your own risk.
providers.authModes.openai.apiKey.label: API Key
providers.authModes.openai.apiKey.descri: Use OpenAI Platform billing with a standard API key.
providers.authModes.openai.chatgptSubscr: Reuse the local Codex/ChatGPT subscription login from this machine for conversation turns. OpenAI embeddings still require an OpenAI API key.
channels.title: Channel & Settings
channels.subtitle: Select your primary communication channel and configure additional settings.
channels.language.title: Language
channels.rag.title: RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
channels.rag.disabledInfo: RAG is disabled. Code search will not be available.
channels.rag.enabledWithProvider: ✓ RAG enabled — will use {{provider}} for embeddings, independently from the response provider chain.
channels.rag.noEmbeddingProviderWithProv: ⚠ Your current response providers don't support embeddings. Select Gemini, OpenAI, or Ollama as the embedding provider to enable RAG code search.
channels.rag.noEmbeddingProviderNoProvid: ⚠ RAG enabled — embedding provider will be auto-detected from your providers.
channels.rag.embeddingProviderInfo: This is a system-wide memory/RAG choice. It does not change which provider Strada uses for conversation turns.
channels.rag.blockedInfo: You can still continue to review, but setup will stay blocked until you pick a valid embedding provider or disable RAG.
channels.rag.openaiEmbeddingNeedsKey: OpenAI ChatGPT/Codex subscription auth covers conversation only. OpenAI embeddings still require an OpenAI API key.
channels.rag.dedicatedEmbeddingKeyInfo: This key is used only for embeddings. It does not add {{provider}} to the response provider chain.
channels.rag.subscriptionNotUsedForEmbed: Subscription login is not used for this embedding request path.
channels.rag.embeddingModelInfo: Leave blank to use the provider default. Set only if you need a specific model.
channels.rag.embeddingModelOllamaInfo: Enter the exact Ollama model name you have pulled (e.g. bge-m3, nomic-embed-text, mxbai-embed-large). Leave blank to use nomic-embed-text.
channels.budget.title: Global Daily Budget
channels.budget.description: Maximum daily spend across all systems (daemon, agents, chat). Set to $0 for unlimited.
channels.daemon.title: Daemon Mode
channels.daemon.enabledInfo: Daemon mode active — background monitoring with triggers, scheduled tasks, and proactive assistance.
channels.daemon.disabledInfo: Enable background monitoring with triggers, scheduled tasks, and proactive assistance.
channels.daemon.subLimitInfo: Maximum daily spend for daemon triggers only (within the global budget).
channels.autonomy.title: Autonomy
channels.autonomy.enabledInfo: Autonomous mode active — the agent can execute operations without asking for confirmation.
channels.autonomy.disabledInfo: Enable autonomous mode to let the agent operate without requiring confirmation for each action.
mcp.title: Strada.MCP
mcp.copy.installed: Detected{{source}}. Brain can use the live Unity runtime surface for this Unity project.
mcp.copy.missing.fallback: Install Strada.MCP to unlock the live Unity runtime surface inside Strada.Brain.
mcp.runtime.caption: {{count}}/3 packages detected
mcp.guidance.step1: Add Strada.MCP as a git submodule inside the Unity project.
mcp.guidance.step3: Run `npm install` so Brain can load the runtime immediately.
mcp.guidance.discoveryDefault: Brain auto-detects sibling and project-local Strada.MCP installs.
mcp.guidance.installNoteDefault: Choose where the checkout should live inside the project.
mcp.target.packages.title: Packages/Submodules
mcp.target.packages.description: Keeps the checkout under Unity Packages and makes the package reference feel native.
mcp.target.assets.title: Assets
mcp.target.assets.description: Places the checkout under Assets if your project convention keeps integrations there.
review.title: Review & Save
review.subtitle: Verify your configuration before saving.
review.values.openaiSubscriptionScopeInf: Conversation only. OpenAI embeddings still require an API key.
review.values.claudeSubscriptionWarningI: Anthropic documents claude.ai subscription auth as restricted outside Claude Code and Claude.ai. Use this mode at your own risk.
review.ragBlockedError: RAG needs a real embedding-capable provider. Add Gemini, OpenAI API key, Mistral, Together, Fireworks, Qwen, or Ollama before saving.
review.save.configAccepted: Configuration accepted. Starting Strada on this same URL.
review.save.booting: Strada is still starting the main web app.
review.save.bootingOpenLink: If this page does not advance, open
review.save.sourceCheckoutHint: If this is a source checkout, run `./strada install-command` once before expecting the bare `strada` command to exist globally.
directory.title: Browse Directory
directory.projectPath.title: Unity Project
directory.projectPath.subtitle: Point Strada.Brain to your Unity project directory.
directory.projectPath.validNotUnity: Valid path, but this is not a Unity project (Assets/ and ProjectSettings/ not found)
